title: Leionema equestre
taxonomy: Leionema equestre is a species of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae. This family includes a variety of plants commonly known as citrus or rue, which are mostly native to Australia and Southeast Asia. The genus Leionema is a group of plants native to Australia, often referred to as lemon-scented leptosperms. The classification of Leionema equestre places it within the Rutaceae family and the genus Leionema. Further classification includes the kingdom Plantae and the phylum Magnoliophyta, among other taxonomic ranks.
